text: Tom has some stickers. He uses the letter n to stand for the number of stickers he has. His friend Sara has 5 more stickers than Tom. Write an expression for the number of stickers Sara has.
generatorSolution:
Step 1: We know Tom has n stickers.
Step 2: Sara has 5 MORE stickers than Tom.
Step 3: 'More' means we add, so Sara has n + 5 stickers.
The correct answer is n + 5.
